use_cases: Displaying status labels like 'Popular', 'New', or 'Best Value' on pricing cards
Showing category tags or skill badges in content interfaces
Indicating notification counts or status indicators in dashboards
Labeling product features or plan tiers in subscription interfaces
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui Badge component that renders inline labels with variant support (default, secondary, destructive, outline). This atomic component is commonly used within pricing cards to highlight plan features, mark featured tiers, or display status indicators. Built with class-variance-authority for flexible styling and fully compatible with Tailwind CSS utility classes.
